name: Sweet & Sour Chicken -Cranberries
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bonned Skinned Chicken Breasts, 1/4 Inch Strips
1 large Green Bell Pepper, cut into 1 inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine chicken strips with cornstarch, salt, sugar, pepper, soy sauce, and garlic. Toss gently.
2. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 20 minutes.
3. Drain the pineapple chunks and reserve the juice in a 1-quart glass measure. Set aside the pineapple.
4. Add water to the reserved pineapple juice to equal 1 cup. Mix in 1/4 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, vinegar, and 1 tablespoon soy sauce with the juice. Stir well. Set aside.
5. Coat a large nonaluminum skillet or wok with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat until hot.
6. Add chicken to the skillet and stir-fry for 5-7 minutes.
7. Add carrots and 1/4 cup water. Cover and cook for 1 minute.
8. Add reserved pineapple chunks and cranberries, stirring briefly.
9. Reduce heat to medium and add the reserved juice mixture. Bring to a boil, stirring until thickened.
10. Stir in the bell pepper and serve over rice.
About 299 calories per 1 cup chicken mixture and 1/2 cup rice (Fat: 1.2g, Cholesterol: 44mg).
